name: Shankaracharya Temple
description: An ancient, highly revered Shiva temple situated majestically on top of a hill, offering a breathtaking, panoramic bird's-eye view of the entire Srinagar city and Dal Lake.
history: Believed to date back to 200 BC, although the current structure is from the 9th century CE. It is named after the great philosopher Adi Shankaracharya who visited here.
famousFor: Ancient Shiva shrine, panoramic views of Dal Lake.
